summary: No specific treatment is indicated for developing continuous hypersensitivity after restoring teeth as per current guidelines; observation may suffice temporarily until more detailed guidance can inform next steps regarding potential removal/replacement with ZOE paste among other possibilities which were beyond scope considering just these four options alone. Agent2 reasoned that because the requirements did not provide pertinent details linking developed sensitivity post-tooth-restoration directly addressed within its context, it was necessary to select
